nasb.text: Is not this the one from which my lord drinks and which he indeed uses for divination? You have done wrong in doing this.’ ”

esv.text: Is it not from this that my lord drinks, and by this that he practices divination? You have done evil in doing this.’”

cnv.text: 這不是我主人喝酒和占卜用的杯嗎？你們所作的，實在不對。’”

ccb.text: 为什么偷我主人用来喝酒和占卜的银杯？你们这是作恶！’”

csbs.text: 这不是我主人喝酒的杯子吗？要知道，我主人必定会用它来占卜。你们这样做就是作恶了！’”
